SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area FROM h3_cells;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(579205133326352383) AS area, h3CellAreaM2(579205133326352384) AS area2 FROM h3_cells WHERE index IN (579205133326352383, 579205133326352384);
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area FROM h3_cells WHERE index = (SELECT index FROM h3_cells LIMIT 1);
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id UInt64, index UInt64);
SELECT a.id, h3CellAreaM2(a.index) AS area FROM additional_data AS a JOIN h3_cells AS b ON a.index = b.index;
SELECT count(*) AS total_cells, avg(h3CellAreaM2(index)) AS avg_area FROM h3_cells;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index + 1) AS updated_area FROM h3_cells WHERE index IN (579205133326352383, 579205133326352384);
WITH (SELECT index FROM h3_cells LIMIT 1) AS min_index SELECT h3CellAreaM2(min_index) AS area;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS area FROM h3_cells WHERE index BETWEEN 579205133326352383 AND 579205133326352385;
SELECT h3CellAreaM2(index) AS cell_area FROM h3_cells WHERE NOT (index ♥ 2 = 0);
